title: Arithmetic Foundations
description: Master percentages, ratios, averages, and the quantitative building blocks tested on every exam.

title: Algebra & Word Problems
description: Equations, inequalities, rates, work problems, and mixture questions — the core of PS difficulty.

title: Number Theory & Advanced Math
description: Exponents, number properties, probability, and counting methods for hard-level questions.

title: Critical Reasoning
description: Identify argument structure, attack and defend conclusions, and master every CR question type.

title: Reading Comprehension
description: Read for structure and purpose, not detail. Efficiently handle main-idea, inference, and detail questions.

title: Data Sufficiency
description: The AD/BCE decision tree, sufficiency vs. value, and the most common trap patterns.

title: Integrated Reasoning
description: Table Analysis, Graphics Interpretation, and Two-Part Analysis — read the right data, answer fast.
